items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-476 southbound between 1.1 miles north of Exit 5: US 1 - SPRINGFIELD/LIMA and .5 miles north of Exit 5: US 1 - SPRINGFIELD/LIMA. There is a lane restriction.
